title: heliconia angelica
intro: Heliconia angelica, also known as the 'Angel's Trumpet', is a tropical flowering plant native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Heliconia angelica include relieving coughs, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to promote relaxation and ease respiratory discomfort.
